name: Desiigner
description:
'''Sidney Royel Selby III''' (born May 3, 1997), better known by his stage name '''Desiigner''', is an American rapper and singer. He is best known for his 2015 debut single "[[Panda (song)|Panda]]", which topped the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]]. Shortly after the song gained viral status online, he signed with [[Kanye West]]'s [[GOOD Music]], an imprint of [[Def Jam Recordings]]. The track served as the lead single for his debut mixtape, ''[[New English (mixtape)|New English]]'' (2016), which had modest commercial success.

His 2016 follow-up single, "[[Tiimmy Turner]]", peaked at number 34 on the ''Billboard'' Hot 100. In 2017, he was featured on the remix of South Korean boy band [[BTS]]' single "[[Mic Drop (song)|Mic Drop]]", which peaked at number 28 on the Hot 100. After releasing his debut EP, ''[[L.O.D. (EP)|L.O.D]]''., in 2018, Desiigner parted ways with both GOOD and Def Jam in 2019.

Despite having three top-40 hits in the United States, Desiigner is frequently described as a [[one-hit wonder]].
